2025-05-24T13:25:00.CONTENT_EN: Transport Department has received notification from MTR Corporation Limited that as informed by Mainland Railway Authorities, advance ticket sales for the following train trips will be suspended due to train scheduling arrangements. For June 4 and onwards: - G6532 (To Shanwei Station), - G828/5 (From Xianbei Station) For June 5 and onwards: - G826/7 (To Xianbei Station) - G6531 (From Shanwei Station) For the latest advance ticket sales arrangements, please refer to the 12306 official website and mobile app, High Speed Rail website (12306. cn) and mobile app.
2025-05-24T13:25:00.CONTENT_CN: 運輸署接獲港鐵公司通知，內地鐵路單位通報，因應列車調度安排，以下車次會暫停預售。 6月4日及以後的車次： -G6532 （前往汕尾站） -G828/5（由西安北站出發） 6月5日及以後的車次： -G826/7（前往西安北站） -G6531（由汕尾站出發） 有關最新預售安排，請留意12306官方網站(12306.cn)及手機應用程式、高速鐵路網頁及手機應用程式。

2025-05-25T17:15:00.CONTENT_EN:

For June 4 and onwards:

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Special traffic and transport arrangements for departures of concert at Kai Tak Sports Park
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 啟德體育園演唱會離場特別交通及運輸安排

2025-05-24T22:15:00.CONTENT_EN: The concert at the Kai Tak Sports Park (KTSP) is scheduled to end later tonight (May 24). As a large number of spectators is expected to disperse at the same time, the Transport Department (TD) urges those leaving the venue to take the MTR as far as possible. The TD has been steering public transport service arrangements and the overall traffic conditions have mostly been smooth so far: MTR:  The headway of the Tuen Ma Line has been enhanced to disperse spectators;  Of note, for cross-boundary travellers, the last train to Lo Wu Station on the ERL via interchanging at Tai Wai Station will depart from Sung Wong Toi Station at 10.59pm and Kai Tak Station at 11.01pm; Special bus routes:  Eleven special bus routes have been arranged at the Sung Wong Toi Road Pick-up/Drop-off Area departing for ports and major districts across the territory;  Cross-boundary travellers may take route no. SP12 to Lok Ma Chau (San Tin) Public Transport Interchange and transfer to the Lok Ma Chau-Huanggang cross-boundary shuttle bus (Yellow Bus) to Lok Ma Chau/Huanggang Port; or route No. A25S to the Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) Hong Kong Port and transfer to the HZMB shuttle bus (Gold Bus) to Macao and Zhuhai; and Taxis:  In view of an outflux of spectators, the waiting time is anticipated to be longer and your patience is appreciated. The KTSP Limited has disseminated real-time information on passengers queuing to the trade directly and mobilised taxis via instant messaging platform. Spectators are advised to take heed of the real-time information via on-site broadcast and the "Easy Leave" (easyleave. police. gov. hk) as well as the latest traffic news through the TD's website (www. td. gov. hk), the "HKeMobility" mobile application, radio and television broadcasts.
2025-05-24T22:15:00.CONTENT_CN: 正在啟德體育園舉行的演唱會預計今日（五月二十四日）稍後結束。由於同一時間離場觀眾較多，運輸署呼籲離場人士盡量乘搭港鐵。署方一直督導公共運輸服務安排，整體交通至今大致暢順： 港鐵： 屯馬綫已加密班次疏導離場觀眾； 過境旅客請注意，經大圍站接駁東鐵綫往羅湖站的最後一班列車將於晚上十時五十九分由宋皇臺站，以及十一時○一分由啟德站開出； 特別巴士路線： 宋皇臺道上落客區已安排11條特別巴士路線前往口岸及港九新界各主要地區； 過境旅客可乘坐第SP12號線往落馬洲（新田）公共運輸交匯處，轉乘落馬洲—皇崗過境穿梭巴士(皇巴)前往落馬洲/皇崗口岸；或第A25S號線在港珠澳大橋香港口岸轉乘港珠澳大橋穿梭巴士（金巴）前往澳門及珠海；及 的士： 由於離場人士較多，預期輪候時間會較長，請耐心輪候登車。啟德體育園已向業界直接發放乘客候車的實時資訊及經即時通訊平台呼籲的士到場。 　　觀眾請留意場地廣播和「離場易」（easyleave.police.gov.hk）提供的實時資訊，以及經運輸署網頁（www.td.gov.hk）、「香港出行易」流動應用程式、電台和電視台發放的最新交通消息。

2025-05-24T23:05:00.CONTENT_EN: The Transport Department (TD) today (May 24) said that the last train to Lo Wu Station on the East Rail Line (ERL) via interchanging at Tai Wai Station has departed from Sung Wong Toi Station and Kai Tak Station. Cross-boundary travellers who missed the last train to Lo Wu Station may take the ERL to Sheung Shui Station and then the KMB route No. 276B or N73 to Lok Ma Chau (San Tin) Public Transport Interchange, and transfer to the Lok Ma Chau-Huanggang cross-boundary shuttle bus (Yellow Bus) for their journey to the Mainland. Spectators are advised to take heed of the real-time information via on-site broadcast and the "Easy Leave" (easyleave. police. gov. hk) as well as the latest traffic news through the TD's website (www. td. gov. hk), the "HKeMobility" mobile application, radio and television broadcasts.
2025-05-24T23:05:00.CONTENT_CN: 運輸署今日(五月二十四日）表示，經港鐵大圍站接駁東鐵綫往羅湖站的最後一班列車已由宋皇臺站及啟德站開出。未能乘搭最後一班列車往羅湖站的過境旅客，可乘搭東鐵綫往上水站，然後轉乘九巴第276B或N73號線往落馬洲（新田）公共運輸交匯處，轉乘落馬洲—皇崗過境穿梭巴士（皇巴）返回內地。 觀眾請留意場地廣播和「離場易」（easyleave.police.gov.hk）提供的實時資訊，以及經運輸署網頁（www.td.gov.hk）、「香港出行易」流動應用程式、電台和電視台發放的最新交通消息。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Taxi service for concert at Kai Tak Sports Park
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 啟德體育園演唱會的士服務

2025-05-24T22:55:00.CONTENT_EN: The Transport Department (TD) today (May 24) said that it is the peak dispersal period of concert at Kai Tak Sports Park, the passenger queue for taxi service at the Sung Wong Toi Road Taxi Pick-up/Drop-off Area is relatively long and it would take some time for boarding the taxis. Spectators are advised to use the MTR to leave the Kai Tak Sports Park. Spectators are advised to take heed of the real-time information via on-site broadcast and the "Easy Leave" (easyleave. police. gov. hk) as well as the latest traffic news through the TD's website (www. td. gov. hk), the "HKeMobility" mobile application, radio and television broadcasts.
2025-05-24T22:55:00.CONTENT_CN: 運輸署今日(五月二十四日）表示現時為啟德體育園演唱會散場人流高峰時段，宋皇臺道的士上落客區現時輪候人數較多，輪候時間會較長。觀眾請選擇乘搭港鐵離開啟德體育園。 　　觀眾請留意場地廣播和「離場易」（easyleave.police.gov.hk）提供的實時資訊，以及經運輸署網頁（www.td.gov.hk）、「香港出行易」流動應用程式、電台和電視台發放的最新交通消息。

2025-05-25T11:46:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of the junction of Nathan Road (Tsim Sha Tsui bound) and Jordan Road  which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2025-05-25T11:46:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的彌敦道(往尖沙咀方向)和佐敦道 交界的部份行車線現已解封。

2025-05-25T17:02:00.CONTENT_EN: The slow lane of Nathan Road (Salisbury Road bound) between Carnarvon Road and Mody Road which was closed due to objects in dangerous position is re-opened to all traffic.
2025-05-25T17:02:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因有物品在危險位置而封閉的彌敦道(往梳士巴利道方向)介乎加拿分道與麼地道之間的慢線現已解封。

2025-05-25T18:28:00.CONTENT_EN: The fast lane of Connaught Road Central (both bounds) near Rumsey Street Multi-Storey Car Park which were closed due to watermain emergency works are re-opened to all traffic.
2025-05-25T18:28:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因水管緊急維修而封閉的干諾道中(來回方向)近林士街多層停車場的快線現已解封。

2025-05-26T09:09:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Waterloo Road (Lion Rock Tunnel bound) near Junction Road which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic. Traffic queue takes time to disperse.
2025-05-26T09:09:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的窩打老道(往獅子山隧道方向)近聯合道的部份行車線現已解封。 車龍有待消散。

2025-05-26T09:24:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Chatham Road South (Yau Ma Tei bound) near Hong Kong Polytechnic University which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2025-05-26T09:24:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的漆咸道南(往油麻地方向)近香港理工大學的部份行車線現已解封。

2025-05-26T10:07:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Butterfly Valley Road (Lai Chi Kok bound) near Ching Cheung Road is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lane is available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2025-05-26T10:07:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，蝴蝶谷道(往荔枝角方向)近呈祥道的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2025-05-26T10:34:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Butterfly Valley Road (Lai Chi Kok bound) near Ching Cheung Road which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2025-05-26T10:34:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的蝴蝶谷道(往荔枝角方向)近呈祥道的部份行車線現已解封。

2025-05-26T10:27:00.CONTENT_EN: The slow lane of Tuen Mun Road (Kowloon bound) near Tuen Hing Road which was closed due to vehicle breakdown is re-opened to all traffic.
2025-05-26T10:27:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因車輛故障而封閉的屯門公路(往九龍方向)近屯興路的慢線現已解封。

2025-05-26T11:46:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to watermain emergency works , the slow lane of Cheung Shun Street (Mong Kok bound) near Cheung Lai Street is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lane is available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2025-05-26T11:46:00.CONTENT_CN: 因水管緊急維修，長順街(往旺角方向)近長荔街的慢線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Cancellation of Individual Sleeper Train Trips
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 個別卧鋪列車車次取消

2025-05-26T19:35:00.CONTENT_EN: Transport Department has received notification from MTR Corporation Limited that As informed by Mainland Railway Authorities, sleeper train trips G899 and G900 travelling between Hong Kong West Kowloon Station and Shanghai Hongqiao Station on the following dates have been cancelled due to works in the mainland section. Cancellation dates: June 8, 9, 15, 16
2025-05-26T19:35:00.CONTENT_CN: 運輸署接獲港鐵公司通知， 內地鐵路單位通報，因應內地路段工程，以下來往香港西九龍站及上海虹橋站的卧鋪列車車次G899及G900取消。 車次取消日期： 6月8,9,15,16日
